name: availability: back-to-back hourly bookings sharing an instant (17:00 out, 17:00 in) on the same room are both allowed — exclusive bounds, now reachable for real (B9/F17)
comment: This is the case B8's rule was written for and could not demonstrate. Exclusive and inclusive bounds disagree on exactly one input — a check-in instant EQUAL to a check-out instant — and the overnight flow can never produce it, because its defaults compare 14:00 against 10:00. B8 proved the rule only in test/availability.test.js, with a unit test explicitly labelled 'B9 preview'. Hourly makes it real: recB0 runs 14:00-17:00 SAST and this guest starts at exactly 17:00 for one hour. Under inclusive bounds the room would be refused and every consecutive hourly slot would be unsellable — the exact revenue leak the strict inequalities exist to prevent, now provable end to end through a real Meta payload.

includes: New *short stay* booking from John Smith
